scripts.dev: sh -c 'bun run --filter @zhidu/server dev & SERVER_PID=$!; bun run --filter @zhidu/web dev; EXIT_CODE=$?; kill ${SERVER_PID}; wait ${SERVER_PID} 2>/dev/null; exit ${EXIT_CODE}'
scripts.start: sh -c 'bun run --filter @zhidu/server start & SERVER_PID=$!; bun run --filter @zhidu/web preview -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${WEB_PORT:-8080}; EXIT_CODE=$?; kill ${SERVER_PID}; wait ${SERVER_PID} 2>/dev/null; exit ${EXIT_CODE}'
